message.content:
@startuml
title Digital Public Goods Backlog\nBasic architecture

actor User
participant "backlog.dpg.net" as backlog
participant "api.backlog.dpg.net" as api
database Database

User -> backlog : HTTP GET /projects
backlog -> api : HTTP GET /projects
api -> Database : Query the projects table
Database -> api : Return the results
api -> backlog : JSON response
backlog -> User : HTML response

@enduml
